mano_cua.result_summary: Chrome 缓存了旧页面（Discord Data Package Explorer），所有 localhost:3000 标签页显示白屏或旧缓存内容。服务端 curl 验证返回 200，但浏览器端无法加载 the-graph 编辑器内容。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All localhost:3000 tabs show blank pages or cached Discord Data Package Explorer content. The static server is running but Chrome cache prevents loading the-graph editor.
